text: I feel a quiet curiosity here. The sleek, modern glass walls and the ordered neatness hint at a place dedicated to thought and creation—perhaps a gallery or an innovation center. Stepping deeper, the R+D wall and screens confirm this: I'm surrounded by ideas in motion, research and development made visually tangible. The colors and lights invite exploration, while the digital displays remind me how intertwined technology and human inquiry have become. In this space, I feel both the solitude of reflection and the electric possibility of discovery.
